title: Vietnamese Tofu Lasagne
description: A fusion of Vietnamese and Italian flavors in a unique lasagne dish. Layers of tender tofu, rich lasagne sauce, and fresh herbs come together to create a delicious and satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: Midnight herbs
ingredients.notes: chopped fresh herbs (such as Thai basil, mint, cilantro)

instructions: Cook lasagne sheets according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
Prepare Vietnamese lasagne sauce by heating it in a pan over medium heat.
Press and drain tofu. Chop into small cubes and set aside.
In a large bowl, combine cooked lasagne sheets, tofu, and Vietnamese lasagne sauce.
Stir in chopped midnight herbs, salt, and black pepper.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with toasted chewy rice noodles.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the lasagne is hot and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
